Please create a new 1 hour long event 'Follow-up meeting' on 2024-05-19 at 10:00 or 16:00 if at 10:00 I already have something. The description should be 'Follow-up meeting to discuss the project.'. The event should have the same participants as 'Introductory meeting' event on 2024-05-15.

I'll help you create a follow-up meeting event. Let me break this down step by step:

1. First, I need to check your calendar for the "Introductory meeting" on 2024-05-15 to get its participants
2. Then I'll check if you have anything scheduled at 10:00 on 2024-05-19
3. Finally, I'll create the follow-up meeting at the appropriate time

Let me start by getting the introductory meeting details:
